$NVDA $AMD $MSFT - SHARES OF OPENAI PARTNERS FALL AFTER REPORT OPENAI FALLS SHORT OF REVENUE AND USER TARGETS

🔸 NVIDIA DOWN 2.8%
🔸 MICROSOFT DOWN 1.2%
🔸 ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES DOWN 6%

Nvidia is making history again:

Nvidia, $NVDA, now represents 4.96% of the MSCI All Country World Index (ACWI), near the highest level on record.

The ACWI Index covers ~85% of global equity markets, including large and mid-cap stocks.

Nvidia’s weight is now larger than Japan’s proportion of 4.94%, the world’s 3rd-largest stock market.

Its contribution to the index is also greater than that of France and Germany combined.

By comparison, the UK, Canada, and China make up 3.30%, 3.09%, and 2.83%, respectively.

There has never been a company like Nvidia.

kept.text:
🇺🇸 SOMETHING VERY BAD IS HAPPENING TO THE U.S. STOCK MARKET. 

The stock market is hitting new all-time highs, led by Nvidia.

But almost no one is focused on the real risk.
An AI bubble is inflating fast.

We’ve seen this before.

2000: Cisco led the internet boom as the core infrastructure play. It fell ~90% and never recovered.

Today: Nvidia is playing the same role for AI. Same position in the cycle. Bigger scale.

Here’s why the risk is higher now:

The “Magnificent 7” make up ~30% of the S&P 500. If AI sentiment breaks, the entire index is exposed.

Big Tech CapEx is exploding toward ~$650B by 2026, but ROI is still unclear. If earnings don’t follow, spending gets cut, and Nvidia is first in line.

On top of that, Japan potentially shifting rates could pull liquidity out of global markets, hitting risk assets hard.

This isn’t just 2000.

It’s 2000 with higher concentration, leverage, and tighter liquidity.

kept.text:
Someone just killed Claude Code subscription fees. And it is completely open source.

A developer built a proxy called free-claude-code that runs Claude Code for free using a free NVIDIA API key pointed at localhost.

That is literally the entire setup.

Here is what it does:
→ Converts Anthropic API calls to NVIDIA NIM format automatically
→ Unlocks 40 requests per minute at zero cost
→ Supports Kimi K2, GLM 4.7, MiniMax M2, Devstral, and more
→ Streams thinking tokens and tool calls live in real time
→ Includes a Telegram bot so you can run Claude Code directly from your phone

No API bill. No rate limit panic. No vendor lock-in.

This goes beyond tools like OpenRouter too. OpenRouter just swaps the model. This turns Claude Code into a free autonomous agent you can control remotely from anywhere.

The people paying $20 a month for API access did not know this existed yet.

Now you do.

Open source on GitHub. Search free-claude-code and get started today

https://t.co/bRFupmfK06

🚨MASSIVE CRASH.  

$440 billion wiped from semiconductor stocks in a single day after 19 straight days of gains.

The $SOX Semiconductor Index crashed 5% today, its worst session in months and the first red day after the longest winning streak in the index's history.

- $NVDA down 3.2% wiping out $200 billion.
- $AVGO down 4.3% wiping out $95 billion.

tweet.text:
🚨 CEO OF NVIDIA JUST DREW A LINE IN THE SAND AND MOST PEOPLE MISSED EXACTLY WHERE HE DREW IT.

"I'd hire the graduate who's expert in AI over the one who isn't. Every time."

Jensen Huang is not talking about people who use ChatGPT.

Everyone uses ChatGPT.

Your grandmother uses ChatGPT.

He is talking about people who know HOW IT WORKS.

The stack underneath the chat window.

The agents that execute without human input.

The frameworks that connect models to real tools.

The workflows that run while everyone else is still typing prompts manually.

The difference between using AI and knowing AI is the difference between riding in a car and knowing how to build one.

One makes you a passenger.

One makes you irreplaceable.

The window where deeply understanding this stack is still a rare skill is closing.

Not in years.

In months.

The graduates Jensen is describing are being built right now.

The question is whether you are building toward that or waiting to see how it shakes out.

Bookmark this.

Follow @cyrilXBT for the exact stack Jensen is talking about — broken down into skills you can build this week.

• NVIDIA Vera Rubin 플랫폼 = NVL72 + Groq LPX + DGX Rubin NVL8 SKU. 한 rack 안에 전부 들어간 단일 통합이 아니라 3 rack form 분산 배치 구조

• Groq LP30 = Samsung Foundry 제조
